title: Mtihani wa Kutoka — Exit Exam
description: The final test. Prove you can hold a real professional conversation using everything you have learned.
description_sw: Mtihani wa mwisho. Thibitisha kwamba unaweza kuwa na mazungumzo halisi ya kazi ukitumia kila kitu ulichojifunza.
sofia_intro: Hongera! Umefika mwisho wa misingi. Sasa, utazungumza na bosi wako wa kwanza. Kumbuka kila kitu ulichojifunza: Jina lako, saa, sehemu za ofisi, na hisia zako. Usiogope, jaribu kuongea!
sofia_intro_sw: Congratulations! You have reached the end of the Foundation. Now, you will speak to your first boss. Remember everything you learned: Your name, time, office vocabulary, and your feelings. Don't be afraid — just try!

lessons.title: Maongezi ya Majaribio
lessons.title_sw: The Simulation — First Day at Work
lessons.sofia_hint: Zungumza na bosi wako wa kwanza! Tumia jina lako, maneno ya ofisi, na hisia zako. Jibu kila swali kwa ujasiri.
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Talk to your first boss! Use your name, office words, and feelings. Answer every question with confidence.
lessons.context_sw: Uko ofisini kwa mara ya kwanza. Bosi (AI) anakuuliza maswali.
lessons.context_en: You are in the office for the first time. Your boss (AI) is asking you questions.

turns.boss_message: Hello! Welcome to the team. What is your name and your job?
turns.hint_sw: Sema: 'My name is [Jina lako] and I am a developer.'
turns.hint_en: Say: 'My name is [Your name] and I am a developer.'
turns.success_response: Nice to meet you! Great to have you on the team.

turns.boss_message: Great. Can you write the report today?
turns.expected_answer: Yes, I can write the report.
turns.hint_sw: Andika: 'Yes, I can write the report.'
turns.hint_en: Type: 'Yes, I can write the report.'

turns.boss_message: Where is the meeting? Is it in the office?
turns.hint_sw: Sema: 'Yes, the meeting is in the office.'
turns.hint_en: Say: 'Yes, the meeting is in the office.'
turns.success_response: Correct! The conference room is on the second floor.

turns.hint_sw: Andika wakati: 'It is 9:00.' (au wakati wa sasa)
turns.success_response: Perfect timing! Let us begin the meeting.

turns.boss_message: Last question — are you tired or happy today?
turns.hint_sw: Sema: 'I am happy and I work hard.'
turns.hint_en: Say: 'I am happy and I work hard.'
turns.success_response: That is the spirit! Welcome to your first day. You are going to do great.

lessons.title: Mazoezi ya Mwisho — Final Mastery Test
lessons.title_sw: Complete the sentences without any help
lessons.sofia_hint: Huu ni mtihani wa mwisho wa kuandika. Kamilisha sentensi hizi bila kusaidiwa na herufi za kwanza.
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: This is your final typing test. Complete these sentences without any letter hints.

blanks.hint_sw: Kutoka 'prepositions' — kitu kiko juu ya mwingine

lessons.title: Cheti cha Msingi
lessons.sofia_message: Umekamilisha masomo yote 18! Sasa uko tayari kuanza safari yako ya kikazi na Hirely Coach.
lessons.sofia_message_sw: You have completed all lessons in Foundation Mode! You are now ready to begin your career journey with Hirely Coach.
